description: Mem is a note-taking and knowledge management service that stores notes and collections with semantic search and organization features. It also offers an MCP server so AI clients can access and manage a user's Mem workspace.
summary: Mem exposes a REST HTTP API at https://api.mem.ai/v2 authenticated with a Mem API key, plus a hosted MCP server at https://mcp.mem.ai/mcp using OAuth.
